layout_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm for industrial sharp look

components_strategy.cards: Flat background, sharp corners (max 2px radius), 1px solid border. Hover states should include a subtle -translate-y-1 and border-primary shift.
components_strategy.buttons: Sharp corners, high contrast. Primary uses bg-primary text-white. Secondary uses border border-primary text-primary. Always explicitly define hover text color.
components_strategy.inputs: Shadcn based. Dark mode: bg-[#141414] border-[#262626] focus:border-[#FF5A00]. Light mode: bg-white border-[#E0E0E0].
components_strategy.ai_chat: Terminal-style UI for the AI Heavy Vehicle Assistant. Use mono font for diagnostic readouts. High-contrast orange accents for AI responses.
components_strategy.tables: Dense layout, uppercase headers, prominent status badges for service history.

image_urls.description: Red semi-truck in desert highway. Use for landing page hero section with a max bg-black/50 overlay for text contrast.
Mechanic working on engine. Use for the 'Services Offered' or 'About Us' section.
Garage interior. Good for the customer portal login background or contact section.

accessibility_and_motion.motion: Minimalistic and rugged. Sharp micro-interactions. Avoid bouncy animations. Use rapid opacity and transform transitions (e.g. 0.15s ease).
accessibility_and_motion.accessibility: Minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio. All interactive elements must have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The entire application UI (navigation, buttons, forms, placeholders, AI chat default texts) MUST be in Turkish (Türkçe). Do not use English labels.

Turkish Glossary: Home -> Ana Sayfa, Dashboard -> Müşteri Paneli, Appointments -> Randevular, Service History -> Servis Geçmişi, AI Assistant -> Yapay Zeka Asistanı, Admin -> Yönetim Paneli, Book -> Randevu Al.
Use @phosphor-icons/react for icons to match the industrial/technical aesthetic.
Implement a dark/light mode toggle in the header. Default theme should be dark.
Customer Portal and Admin Panel MUST use the 'Control Room' dense grid layout, utilizing screen real estate for data tables, appointment lists, and AI analysis widgets.
The Landing page MUST use a wide 'Bento' or 'Tetris' asymmetrical layout. Avoid basic bootstrap column looks.
CRITICAL: Apply 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='book-appointment-btn').
Font Implementation: Do NOT use 'Inter'. Configure tailwind.config.js to load 'Barlow Condensed' (headings), 'Manrope' (body), and 'Roboto Mono' (technical data/AI outputs).
Use Shadcn UI for the complex interactions (Datepicker for appointments, Tabs, Tables) but customize their borders and border-radius to be sharp (rounded-none or rounded-sm).
